description:
Create snippets of text for support responses, sales outreach, or even common emails and save them in TextExpander.


What's new in TextExpander 8.4.3
New Features
- Command menu (Ctrl+K): A new in-app command menu gives you quick access to common actions.
- Replay Snippet expansion: A new Ctrl+0 shortcut in Quick Actions replays the last snippet expansion.
- Dark Mode for fill-in windows: Fill-in windows now honor system dark mode on macOS, Windows, and Chrome.
- One-click support log file collection (macOS & Windows)
- Accessibility improvements:
  - Larger touch targets
  - Updated color contrast to meet WCAG standards
  - Keyboard access to Context Menus, Macro Edits
  - Improved focus styles across components
- Date picker respects system first day of week setting
